---
title: Knit example
fig_caption: true
---

# Figures

```{r, cars, fig.cap="A scatterplot.", echo=FALSE}
plot(cars)
```

```{r, fig.cap=c("hello", "bye"), echo=FALSE, fig.retina=1}
plot(1:10)
cat('\n\n')
hist(rnorm(1000))
```

```mermaid
%%{
  init: {
    "flowchart": { "htmlLabels": false }
  }
}%%
graph TD;
    A-->B;
    A-->C;
    B-->D;
    C-->D;
```
<!---->

```mermaid
%%{
  init: {
    "flowchart": { "htmlLabels": false }
  }
}%%
graph TD
    A{Does your flowchart have arrows?} --> B[No]
    A --> C[yes]
    B --> D(Add them already)
    C --> E(Yay, what a great flowchart!)
    D -.->|you can even add text to them| A
```
<!---->

```mermaid
%%{
  init: {
    "flowchart": { "htmlLabels": false }
  }
}%%
graph LR

A & B--> C & D
style A fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:px
style B fill:#bbf,stroke:#f66,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff,stroke-dasharray: 5 5

subgraph beginning
A & B
end

subgraph ending
C & D
end
```
<!---->
